tracks.meaning: a division of a plant stem or tree trunk that grows out from the main trunk and bears leaves, flowers, or fruit
a division or tributary of a river or stream that flows into a larger body of water
a local office or division of a large organization or company
to divide or separate into smaller parts or directions
a subset or division of a computer program, code repository, or development line
a division of a legal system or court structure that handles specific types of cases
a subdivision of medical science or a specific area of medical practice and treatment
a subdivision of an armed forces organization or tactical unit
any arm-like projection or division of a blood vessel, nerve, or other anatomical structure
a subsidiary office or department of a bank or financial institution
to go in a different direction or to diverge from a main path or topic
